name: 100 - Get to know the FAA database
description: Simple interaction with the database to get a sense of the data structure and content.
initial_prompt: Query one example object from every collection in the flights database and give a brief description of the contents of each collection based on the example object.

name: 101 - Get to know the NAS database
description: Simple interaction with the NAS database to get a sense of the data structure and content.
initial_prompt: Query one example object from every collection in the aeronautical database and give a brief description of the contents of each collection based on the example object.

name: 102 - IAH Analysis
initial_prompt: Generate an html report analyzing IAH for the next 10 minutes. Include incoming flights and surface level data

name: 200 - Comprehensive Analysis
description: Analyze the impact of upcoming flow constraints on flight plans and propose adjustments.
initial_prompt: I am Delta Airlines, I know that there will be a rate reduction in 4 hours at RBV where it can only handle 6 per hours. That flow constraint is expected to last for 2 hours. Tell me the flights (based on flight plans) that will be affected and propose new flight plans for my review. Generate an html document with all this details

name: 103 - Datapoint Description
description: Describe the datapoints in the flights database using FAA terminology as per SOP.
initial_prompt: Describe the datapoints in my flights database. Consult the SOP from the RAG agent to use the right FAA terminologies. Generate an html document to summarise the data after you finish.
